chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-1307 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on MA-63271/2017 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA-2759/2017 4. For katcha peshi. 5. For orders on MA-2760/2017 02.10.2017 Counsel for the petitioner is called absent. Since the life and liberty of a citizen is involved in this petition, therefore, the matter is taken up. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel = 1. Granted. 2. Over-ruled 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. With reference to the notice of previous date, learned State Counsel files statement/parawise comments on behalf of respondents No.1, 3 and 4, which are taken on record. According to the parawise comments, the dispute between the petitioner and the private respondents is of civil nature. It is further stated that the petitioner has never been harassed or threatened by local police. It has also been stated that neither the petitioner was ever called at the police station nor asked for any compromise with the private respondents, however, the official respondents in their comments have undertaken that they will provide legal protection to the petitioner if she approaches them with such a request. In view of the above, this petition is being disposed of with direction to the private respondents No.5 to 8 namely Gul Sher, Allahdino, Gulzaman, Badar Zaman, all by caste Sario, not to cause any harassment to the petitioner, whereas, the official respondents are directed to discharge their functions and duties strictly in accordance with law in a fair and reasonable manner without patronizing any group or individuals.

It has also been stated that neither the petitioner was ever called at the police station nor asked for any compromise with the private respondents, however, the official respondents in their comments have undertaken that they will provide legal protection to the petitioner if she approaches them with such a request. In view of the above, this petition is being disposed of with direction to the private respondents No.5 to 8 namely Gul Sher, Allahdino, Gulzaman, Badar Zaman, all by caste Sario, not to cause any harassment to the petitioner, whereas, the official respondents are directed to discharge their functions and duties strictly in accordance with law in a fair and reasonable manner without patronizing any group or individuals. The petitioner and the private respondents are at liberty to seek remedy of their grievances, if any, before the appropriate forum by invoking due process of law and not by taking law in their hands. Since the private respondents No.5 to 8 despite notice are not in attendance, therefore, the concerned SHO is also directed to serve the copy of this order on the above named private respondents by calling them in Police Station and compliance of such service should be furnished with the Additional Registrar of this Court. JUDGE Shahid
